Deepscript Conditionals

Logic (Conditionals).

Abstract.

Conditional Functions utilise a standard functional Nashorn scope-based nomenclature. They may be placed within named scopes or other logic fields for firing items such as in-game events.

Custom Checks.

  • declareCustomCivilisationDiplomaticValueCheck(arg0_options)
    • base_name: (String) - The base function name.
    • array_resolve_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1)
    • value_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0)
  • declareCustomCivilisationValueCheck(arg0_options)
    • base_name: (String) - The base function name.
    • array_resolve_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1)
    • value_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0)
  • declareCustomProvinceValueCheck(arg0_options)
    • base_name: (String) - The base function name.
    • array_resolve_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the left-hand comparison value. (Parameter 1)
    • value_function: (Function) - The resolution function that resolves the right-hand comparison value. (Parameter 0)

Meta Scope Conditions.
getCivilisationFlag(arg0_civ_tag, arg1_flag_key)
getCivilisationVariable(arg0_civ_tag, arg1_variable_key)
getProvinceFlag(arg0_province, arg1_flag_key)
getProvinceVariable(arg0_province, arg1_variable_key)

Gamestate Scope Conditions.

  1. Global Scope Conditions. Meta.
    Civilisation.
  • anyCivilisationDoesNotExist(arg0_civ_tags)
  • anyCivilisationExists(arg0_civ_tags)
  • civilisationDoesNotExist(arg0_civ_tags)
  • civilisationExists(arg0_civ_tags) Time.
  • dateIs(arg0_date_string) - DD.MM.YYYY format.
  • dateIsGEQ(arg0_date_string)
  • dateIsGreaterThan(arg0_date_string)
  • dateIsLEQ(arg0_date_string)
  • dateIsLessThan(arg0_date_string)
  • hourIs(arg0_number)
  • hourIsGEQ(arg0_number)
  • hourIsGreaterThan(arg0_number)
  • hourIsLEQ(arg0_number)
  • hourIsLessThan(arg0_number)

  1. International Organisation Scope Conditions.

  2. Resource Scope Conditions. WIP.

    Meta.

  • resourceIs(arg0_resource_names, arg1_resource_names)

  • resourceIsNot(arg0_resource_names, arg1_resource_names)

  • resourcePriceIs(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourcePriceIsGEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourcePriceIsGreaterThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourcePriceIsLEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourcePriceIsLessThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

    Production.

  • resourceCivilisationsHaveMarketShare(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceCivilisationsHaveMarketShareGEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceCivilisationsHaveMarketShareGreaterThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceCivilisationsHaveMarketShareLEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceCivilisationsHaveMarketShareLessThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceGlobalProductionIs(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourceGlobalProductionIsGEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourceGlobalProductionisGreaterThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourceGlobalProductionIsLEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourceGlobalProductionIsLessThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_value)

  • resourceProductionIs(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceProductionIsGEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceProductionIsGreaterThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceProductionIsLEQ(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)

  • resourceProductionIsLessThan(arg0_resource_names, arg1_options)

    • civilisations: (Number/List<String, CivTag>)
    • value: (Number)
  1. Civilisation Scope Conditions. Economy (Buildings).

  • civilisationBuildingCategoryConstructedIs(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_category_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingCategoryConstructedIsGEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_category_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingCategoryConstructedIsGreaterThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_category_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingCategoryConstructedIsLEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_category_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingCategoryConstructedIsLessThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_category_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingConstructedIs(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingConstructedIsGEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingConstructedIsGreaterThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingConstructedIsLEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingConstructedIsLessThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingGroupConstructedIsGreaterThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_group_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationBuildingGroupConstructedIsLessThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_building_group_names, arg2_value)

  • civilisationUniqueCapitalBuildingsConstructedIs(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationUniqueCapitalBuildingsConstructedIsGEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationUniqueCapitalBuildingsConstructedIsGreaterThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationUniqueCapitalBuildingsConstructedIsLEQ(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationUniqueCapitalBuildingsConstructedIsLessThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

    Economy (Civilisation).

  • civilisationEconomyIncomeIs(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationMoneyIsGreaterThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationMoneyIsLessThan(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

    Economy (Goods/Resources).

  • civilisationHasResource(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_resource_names)

  • civilisationHasResourceProvinces(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_options)

    • provinces: (String, ProvinceID/Array<String, ProvinceID>) - Optional. Selects Province IDs based on value criteria. All provinces civilisation owns by default.
    • resources: (List<String, ResourceTag>)
    • value: (Number/String, Value) - Optional. The number of provinces needed that meet the criteria. 1 by default.

  • civilisationIsLargestProducerOf(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_resource_names)

  • civilisationIsLargestProducerOfNumberOfResources(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_value)

  • civilisationLargestResourceProducedIs(arg0_civ_tags, arg1_resource_names)

  1. Province Scope Conditions.
    Economy (Buildings).

  • provinceControllerIs(arg0_provinces, arg1_civ_tags)

  • provinceOwnerIs(arg0_provinces, arg1_civ_tags)
  • provinceOwnerIsNot(arg0_provinces, arg1_civ_tags) Military.
  • provinceArmyIs(arg0_provinces, arg1_options)
    • tag: (String, CivTag)
    • has_general: (FilePath.JSON) - Optional. The required general to be in the province. Not required by default.
    • value: (Number) - The required strength of the army in the province.
  • provinceHasArmy(arg0_provinces)
  • provinceHasArmyFrom(arg0_provinces, arg1_civ_tags)
  • provinceDefenceLevelIs(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)
  • provinceDefenceLevelIsGEQ(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)
  • provinceDefenceLevelIsGreaterThan(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)
  • provinceDefenceLevelIsLEQ(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)

  • provinceManpowerIsGreaterThan(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)
  • provinceManpowerIsLEQ(arg0_provinces, arg1_value)
  • provinceManpowerIsLessThan(arg0_provinces, arg1_value) Politics.
